Welcome

S&S Washing LLC

S&S Washing LLC has been serving Portland and the surrounding region with premium pressure washing services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Portland Trusts S&S Washing LLC

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

House Washing

Portland's wet climate breeds moss, mildew, and algae, which can damage siding, brick, and other exterior surfaces. Our ...

Roof Cleaning

A dirty roof isn't just an eyesore; it can also lead to serious damage and costly repairs. Moss, algae, and lichen trap ...

Driveway & Patio Cleaning

Driveways and patios are prone to stains from oil, grease, dirt, and algae. These stains not only look unsightly but can...

Fence Cleaning

Fences are exposed to the elements, making them susceptible to dirt, grime, algae, and mildew. These contaminants can no...

Gutter Cleaning

Clogged gutters can cause a variety of problems, including water damage to your roof, siding, and foundation. They can a...

Commercial Pressure Washing

First impressions matter. A clean and well-maintained exterior can attract customers and create a positive image for you...

Contact Us →
“
S&S Washing did an amazing job on our house in the Hawthorne district. Our siding was covered in moss and algae, and now it looks brand new! They were professional, efficient, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!
— Sarah M.
